name: ui-upgrade.md
description: Internal planning document outlining an 8-phase UI upgrade plan for the voxlblade-builder, covering modal extraction, toast system, CSS consolidation, responsive improvements, performance, accessibility, and build comparison features.
responsibilities: Document current state of the UI codebase
Define design tokens and CSS variables
Plan 8 implementation phases for UI refactoring
List key file references and risk mitigations

name: .understandignore
description: Configuration file for the Understand-Anything plugin that specifies file patterns to exclude from codebase analysis, following .gitignore syntax conventions.
responsibilities: Define exclusion patterns for codebase analysis
Support negation patterns with ! prefix
Provide commented-out suggestions for common exclusion patterns

name: scan-result.json
description: Machine-readable output of the Understand-Anything codebase scanner, listing every file in the project with its language, line count, and category classification.
responsibilities: Catalog all project files with metadata
Provide input for downstream knowledge graph assembly
Track file languages and categories

name: tour.json
description: Ordered guided tour definition for onboarding new users to the codebase, with 10 steps covering project overview, entry points, types, game data, constants, calculation engine, state management, UI primitives, feature components, and damage analysis views.
responsibilities: Define guided onboarding tour steps
Map tour steps to node IDs in the knowledge graph
Provide descriptions for each architectural layer

name: ua-inline-validate.cjs
description: Node.js validation script that checks the assembled knowledge graph JSON for structural integrity: validates node/edge schemas, checks for duplicate IDs, verifies layer and tour references, and reports orphan nodes.
responsibilities: Validate graph node schemas (id, type, name, summary, tags)
Check for duplicate node IDs
Verify edge source/target references exist
Validate layer assignments and tour step references
Report orphan nodes without edges
Output validation statistics

name: decode_full.mjs
description: Standalone debug/development tool that decodes a complete build state into accumulated stats and final perks using the same formulas as the main calculation engine. Used for testing and debugging build calculations outside the web app.
responsibilities: Load game data from JSON files (armors, blades, handles, rings, runes, races, guilds, enchantments, perks)
Apply upgrades, enchantments, shrine bonuses, and infusions to equipment
Accumulate stats from all equipment sources
Finalize perks with Perk Effectiveness and Cursed modifiers
Output weapon damage type breakdowns and core stats

name: ONBOARDING.md
description: Auto-generated onboarding guide produced from the knowledge graph, describing the project's architecture layers (root config, source root, data layer, library layer, UI layer), key files, tech stack, and how to get started.
responsibilities: Document project overview and tech stack
Describe architecture layers with key file references
Provide development workflow instructions
List testing, linting, and build commands

name: app.css
description: Global CSS stylesheet defining the complete design token system for the voxlblade-builder UI, including color variables, spacing scale, border radii, shadows, font sizes, durations, easing curves, scrollbar styles, and component-specific utility classes.
responsibilities: Define CSS custom property design tokens (colors, spacing, radii, shadows, fonts)
Set Draconic theme color variables
Provide global reset and body styling
Define scrollbar appearance
Style weapon art and wild bolt UI components
Define drag-and-drop visual feedback styles

name: App.svelte
description: The monolithic root component (~3,979 lines) that orchestrates the entire application: manages all build state, equipment modals, armor slot selection/drag-and-drop, weapon art configuration, draconic ability panels, stat summary grid, and coordinates child components including DamageAnalyzer, BuffList, and BuildSaves.
responsibilities: Manage top-level build state via Svelte store
Render equipment selection modals (race, guild, armor, ring, rune, weapon parts)
Handle armor slot drag-and-drop reordering
Display stat summary grid with all accumulated stats
Configure weapon art selection and cooldown reduction calculations
Render draconic ability stats panel
Coordinate DamageAnalyzer, BuffList, BuildSaves, and filter components
Manage undo/redo history

name: BaseDamageCalc.svelte
description: Component (~2,566 lines) that renders detailed per-hit damage breakdowns for individual weapon hits, showing base damage, scaling multipliers, crit values, armor penetration, defense reduction, damage type splits, DoT ticks, and on-hit perk damage sources for each computed hit.
responsibilities: Render per-hit damage breakdown rows with base/scaling/combat multipliers
Display damage type splits (physical, magic, fire, etc.) with color coding
Show defense reduction calculations per damage type
Display critical hit damage values
Render DoT (Bleed/Burn/Poison) tick damage breakdowns
Show on-hit perk damage sources
Display weapon boost multipliers and conditions
Handle heal vs damage display modes

name: BuffList.svelte
description: Component (~759 lines) that displays and manages all active buffs and debuffs for the current build, with tabbed views for buffs/debuffs/neutral effects, potency bars, duration display, source tracking, and DoT potency calculations including Darkening Hex and Endless Despair modifiers.
responsibilities: Display active buffs, debuffs, and neutral effects in tabbed views
Calculate buff potency from item sources, perk sources, and weapon art sources
Apply buff perk modifiers and warding debuff multiplier
Calculate DoT display potency with Endless Despair modifier
Show buff sources with potency bars and durations
Display Draconic infusion buffs and ability debuffs
Show auto-debuffs from perks
Track Minion Absorption potency

name: BuildSaves.svelte
description: Component (~596 lines) that provides build save/load functionality with named slots stored in localStorage, supporting save, load, delete, rename, export/import via share codes, and confirmation dialogs with timeout auto-reset.
responsibilities: Manage save slots in localStorage with timestamps
Save and load build states to/from slots
Export builds as encoded share codes
Import builds from share codes
Rename save slots
Confirm destructive actions (load/delete) with timeout
Display slot metadata (name, timestamp, summary)
Responsive mobile sheet UI

name: CdrStepsCalc.svelte
description: Small component (~93 lines) that renders a step-by-step visual breakdown of cooldown reduction (CDR) calculations, showing each multiplier step with before/after values, floor operation, and minimum cooldown capping.
responsibilities: Display CDR reduction steps sequentially
Show set-bonus override when applicable
Display floor operation and minimum cooldown cap
Render visual arrows and operators between steps

name: CritIcon.svelte
description: Minimal SVG icon component (~14 lines) that renders a critical hit icon with a gradient fill, accepting a configurable size prop.
responsibilities: Render critical hit SVG icon
Accept size prop for dimensions
Use unique gradient ID per instance

name: DamageAnalyzer.svelte
description: The largest component (~6,806 lines) serving as the primary damage analysis interface, computing full damage pipelines for M1 attacks, weapon arts, runes, summons, self-damage perks, heals, and DoTs with comprehensive reactive computation chains for defense reduction, crit, boosts, and damage type bonuses.
responsibilities: Compute full damage pipeline for all attack types (M1, M2, WA, rune, summon)
Calculate defense reduction per damage type from armor, perks, and debuffs
Compute critical hit chances and damage multipliers
Apply damage type bonuses from perks and draconic runes
Calculate self-damage from perks (Undead Might, etc.)
Compute heal amounts with crit healing and heal boost
Calculate DoT tick damage for Bleed/Burn/Poison/Caustic Slow
Display comprehensive damage breakdowns with tooltips
Manage debuff/buff state interactions (Photosynthesis, Vampire)
Render weapon art and summon damage panels

name: Boost.ts
description: Defines the complete boost system (~375 lines) for damage and healing multipliers from perks, with both simple multiplier-per-stack definitions and complex context-dependent calculation functions for conditional boosts like Ferocity, Spirit Winds, Wild Bolt, Guardian Spin, Penance, and Minion Absorption.
responsibilities: Define BoostDef interface with simple and complex boost types
Implement 40+ damage/healing boost definitions
Calculate Frenzy percentage from rage potency
Calculate Minion Absorption potency from summon boost
Provide BoostContext interface for conditional calculations
Export BOOST_DEF_MAP for lookup by source name

name: BuffData.ts
description: The central buff/debuff definition module (~1,848 lines) defining 60+ buff and debuff definitions with colors, descriptions, effect formulas, and providing functions to assemble active buffs from items/perks/weapon arts, apply perk modifiers, calculate buff effects, and handle special conversions (Tailwind→Whirlwind, Cauterize).
responsibilities: Define BuffDefinition interface with name, color, description, effect formula
Define GrantedBuff interface for runtime buff instances
Provide BUFF_DEFS record with 60+ buff/debuff definitions
Implement getActiveBuildBuffs to collect buffs from equipment
Implement getPerkBuffs and getWeaponArtBuffs
Apply buff perk modifiers and warding debuff multiplier
Convert Tailwind buffs to Whirlwind when applicable
Apply Cauterize conversion
Calculate buff effect values for display
Format perk descriptions with potency calculations

name: cdr.ts
description: Defines the cooldown reduction (CDR) perk data (~64 lines) mapping perk names to their CDR effects on runes and weapon arts, supporting flat percentage, multiplicative, set-bonus, and filter-based CDR types with optional toggleability.
responsibilities: Define PerkCDREntry interface for CDR configurations
Map 9 CDR-granting perks to their rune/wa reduction values
Support multiplicative CDR functions (Channeled Weapon, Voltaic Body)
Support set-bonus CD overrides (Gladiatorial Rage)
Support filter-based CDR (Gladiatorial Rage only on Rage Rune)

name: debuffCombatEffects.ts
description: Defines combat effects for enemy debuffs (~98 lines) including damage multipliers, defense reductions, and elemental damage type vulnerability modifications for Weakness, Shatter, Sticky, Electrical Rend, Despair, Frostbite, Hypnotized, and their variants.
responsibilities: Define DebuffCombatEffect interface with descFn, damageMult, defReduction, typeDamageMult
Implement 8 debuff combat effects with description generators
Calculate damage multipliers for Weakness and Despair
Calculate defense reductions for Shatter and Electrical Rend
Apply elemental vulnerability for Frostbite and Sticky variants

name: defensivePerks.ts
description: Defines defensive perk sources (~207 lines) that provide damage reduction, with context-dependent activation (HP thresholds, darkness, rage, mounting, protection), including Barbskin, Stoneskin, Adaptive Plate, Protector Spirit, Valor, Vampire, Frenzy, and Carapace.
responsibilities: Define DefensivePerkSource interface with conditions and DR formulas
Implement 13 defensive perk sources with activation conditions
Calculate active defensive perk DR values from context
Calculate defensive potency multiplier from Bastion Bless and Draconic infusion
Support HP-gated perks (Protector Spirit)
Support context-dependent perks (Vampire/Darkness, Frenzy/Rage, Mounted Defense)

name: DoTDamage.ts
description: Defines the Damage over Time (DoT) calculation system (~103 lines) for Bleed, Burn, Poison, and Caustic Slow, implementing the base damage formula, potency multiplier with power scaling, tick computation, and Endless Despair modifier for display potency.
responsibilities: Define DoT types (Bleed, Burn, Poison, Caustic Slow)
Calculate base DoT damage from infliction potency
Calculate potency multiplier with power scaling
Compute individual DoT ticks
Calculate Caustic Slow damage with slow duration multiplier
Convert builder-display potency to game-internal potency
Apply Endless Despair modifier to display potency

name: draconicBuffs.ts
description: Implements Draconic guild buff logic (~112 lines) for Dragon Infusion (potency/duration multipliers, color-specific effects like Burn application) and Dragon Claw/Bubble ability debuffs (Weakness, random debuff pool for Hex, Burn for Fire).
responsibilities: Calculate Draconic infusion potency and duration multipliers
Generate Draconic Infusion buff with color-specific effects
Generate Dragon Claw/Bubble ability debuffs based on color
Provide color-specific effect descriptions (attack speed, knockback, burn, debuff potency)
Handle Holy infusion special potency multiplier

name: draconicColorEffects.ts
description: Defines Draconic color attack stats (~50 lines) mapping each Draconic color (fire, air, earth, water, holy, hex) to their damage multipliers, speed multipliers, knockback, cooldown, stun multipliers, and special effects (burn, weakness, healing).
responsibilities: Define DraconicColorAttackStats interface
Map 6 Draconic colors to their combat stat multipliers
Provide getDraconicColorDmgMultiplier lookup function
Reference constants for speed, knockback, cooldown, stun, and debuff chances

name: draconicRunes.ts
description: Implements Draconic rune damage type bonus system (~104 lines) that adds flat damage type bonuses based on Draconic rune stacks and Dragon Infusion buff state, with both mutation-based (applyDraconicBonuses) and pure (getDraconicBonuses) API styles.
responsibilities: Calculate Draconic Runes bonus damage per color based on stack count
Calculate Dragon Infusion bonus damage from buff potency
Apply both bonuses to damage type records (mutating)
Provide pure-function bonus calculation (non-mutating)
Handle default physical damage type when no color selected

name: enemyHpEffects.ts
description: Defines enemy HP-gated debuff and DoT boost effects (~90 lines) that trigger based on enemy health thresholds, currently implementing Mycotic Bloom's dual-phase behavior: applying Slowness above 50% HP and boosting Poison damage below 50% HP.
responsibilities: Define EnemyHpGate interface for HP threshold conditions
Define EnemyHpEffectDef for perk-triggered HP-gated effects
Implement Mycotic Bloom's above/below 50% HP effects
Calculate active enemy HP debuffs from perk amounts and HP fill
Calculate enemy HP-based DoT multipliers
